root_text.an6.31:1.1: “Chayime, bhikkhave, dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an6.31:1.3: Kammārāmatā, bhassārāmatā, niddārāmatā, saṅgaṇikārāmatā, indriyesu aguttadvāratā, bhojane amattaññutā—
root_text.an6.31:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, cha dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an6.31:2.1: Chayime, bhikkhave, dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an6.31:2.3: Na kammārāmatā, na bhassārāmatā, na niddārāmatā, na saṅgaṇikārāmatā, indriyesu guttadvāratā, bhojane mattaññutā—
root_text.an6.31:2.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, cha dhammā sekhassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattantī”ti.

translation_text.an6.31:1.1: “These six things lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.
translation_text.an6.31:1.3: They relish work, talk, sleep, and company. They don’t guard the sense doors, and they eat too much.
translation_text.an6.31:1.4: These six things lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.
translation_text.an6.31:2.1: These six things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.
translation_text.an6.31:2.3: They don’t relish work, talk, sleep, and company. They guard the sense doors, and they don’t eat too much.
translation_text.an6.31:2.4: These six things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant trainee.”
